About
Purpose-Driven Products

REM Ventures builds SaaS products that solve real, underserved problems. Based in Maryland, we combine deep industry insight with modern web technology — Next.js, Supabase, and AI — to ship focused tools that make an immediate impact.

Portfolio
Our Products
Five focused SaaS products targeting distinct, underserved markets with clear paths to revenue.
FinTech · B2C

Meatloaf

A gamified credit-building platform helping renters transition to homeownership. Build credit with rent payments, track progress with interactive tools, and unlock personalized mortgage readiness milestones.

→
FinTech · B2C

Fides Credit

A self-sovereign credit platform where renters own and control their payment data. Bypass the Big 3 bureaus with transparent scoring, verifiable payment history, and a direct path to homeownership.

→
CRM · B2B

StackedWork

An AI-powered CRM for contractors in the Baltimore market. Voice-to-job entry, automated scheduling, revenue dashboards, and smart client management — built for the way contractors actually work.

→
CivicTech · B2B

OutSpend

A campaign collaboration network with AI-generated political ads for grassroots Congressional candidates. Remix proven strategies, generate video content, and compete with better-funded opponents.

→
Family · B2C

LunchNote

A parent-child connection app that delivers encouraging messages, brain games, and stress-relief activities to kids during school lunch. Digitizing the lunch note tradition for the smartphone generation.

→
